title: Sophisticated Storage (Unofficial Fabric port)
description: This is the Unofficial Fabric version of Sophisticated Storage.
body:
This is the **Unofficial Fabric** version of **Sophisticated Storage**

For more information please check the official page of [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) by P3pp3rF1y.

This mod needs [Sophisticated Core (Unofficial Fabric Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core-(unofficial-fabric-port)).

**[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) is required if you use Sodium <0.6.0!**

Looking for a backpack mod too? Checkout [Sophisticated Backpacks (Unofficial Fabric Port)!](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port))
